title: Ukrainian Piquant Pasta
description: A hearty Ukrainian-inspired pasta dish with a tangy piquant sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the piquant, tomato paste, and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Stir in the cooked pasta and cook for 1-2 minutes to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Optional: add cooked narutomaki on top for added protein.
